passing_score_scale: Above Target / Target / Below Target / Needs Improvement
id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID with full name and signature. Name must match exactly as registered with PMI.
exam_rules: No notes or study materials. Calculator provided on-screen. One optional 10-minute break at question 90 (PMP). Personal items stored. No phones.
renewal_options: Earn PDUs (Professional Development Units) through education or giving back activities. PMP requires 60 PDUs every 3 years. Submit PDUs via PMI's Continuing Certification Requirements (CCR) system.

prerequisites.description: Secondary degree (high school diploma, associate's degree or equivalent)
23 hours of project management education completed before exam

retake_policy.notes: 3 attempts allowed within a certification cycle. No waiting period specified between attempts. Full re-application and fee required for each attempt.

domains.name: Project Management Fundamentals and Core Concepts

official_study_resources.title: PMI Exam Content Outline (ECO)
official_study_resources.notes: Free downloadable exam content outline — the official blueprint

aliases: certified associate in project management capm
